description: Generic corporate phishing templates covering news, travel, and internal communications

templates.name: Breaking News Alert
suggested_subject_lines: Breaking: Major announcement affecting your department
Urgent internal news — employees must read
templates.notes: Leans on curiosity and fear of missing out around company news. Most effective during periods of real organizational change (reorgs, M&A) when employees expect announcements. Avoid running it alongside genuine all-hands comms to prevent confusion.

templates.name: Corporate Travel Agency Notice
suggested_subject_lines: Your upcoming travel booking requires action
Corporate Travel: Update your travel profile before your trip
Travel approval: Your trip itinerary has changed
templates.notes: Best aimed at frequent travelers and sales teams. The booking-change pretext creates time pressure without alarming the recipient. Customize the agency name to match a travel tool your organization actually uses.

templates.name: Corporate Performance Review Request
suggested_subject_lines: Annual Performance Evaluation: Complete your self-assessment
Manager Request: Finalize your performance review by Friday
HR Performance: Review your feedback for the annual appraisal cycle
templates.notes: Performance review cycles are high-anxiety events. Employees are highly motivated to respond quickly to HR requests regarding appraisals and salary reviews.
